hero.subheadline: Streamline operations, delight customers, and boost revenue with Grafterr's all-in-one restaurant management platform. From POS to kitchen display, we power your entire workflow.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to
featuresSection.subtitle: Powerful, intuitive tools designed specifically for modern restaurants. Manage orders, streamline kitchen operations, and empower your customers — all from one unified platform.

products.name: Point of Sale
products.description: Lightning-fast order processing with an intuitive interface your staff will love. Accept payments, manage tables, and track sales in real time.

products.name: Self-service Kiosk
products.description: Let customers browse menus, customize orders, and pay — all on their own. Reduce wait times and increase average order value by up to 30%.

products.name: Kitchen Management
products.description: Real-time order routing, priority tracking, and prep-time analytics. Keep your kitchen running like clockwork during peak hours.

solutionsSection.title: Built for every
solutionsSection.subtitle: Whether you run a cozy café or a multi-location franchise, Grafterr adapts to your unique workflow.

solutions.name: Quick Service
solutions.description: Speed-optimized workflows for fast-casual and takeaway restaurants. Process orders in seconds, not minutes.

solutions.name: Full Service Dining
solutions.description: Table management, course sequencing, and split billing — everything your front-of-house team needs to deliver exceptional service.

solutions.name: Multi-Location
solutions.description: Centralized menu management, consolidated reporting, and real-time performance tracking across all your locations.

solutions.name: Cloud Kitchens
solutions.description: Manage multiple virtual brands from one kitchen. Integrated delivery platform routing and order aggregation.

ctaSection.headline: Ready to transform your restaurant?
ctaSection.subheadline: Join thousands of restaurants already using Grafterr to streamline operations and delight customers.

modal.title: Start your free trial
